developer_response: I implemented the REST endpoint using Hono with Zod validation. The main tradeoff was using deterministic depth classification instead of a real LLM call to avoid spawning child processes in the test environment. This keeps the response predictable and fast while still satisfying the schema requirements defined in the PRP.
ai_evaluation: The response shows reasonable understanding and covers the key points. To reach a deeper level, consider addressing edge cases or alternative approaches considered.
